name: Official Chukyagiri
overview: Official Chukyagiri - is about an intern, and we see the corporate world from his eyes- like the ideals that he comes with after doing his MBA, and the real world out there and all the learnings that he has from his books and his teachers, and how the big bad world is so different.

trailers.title: Official Chukyagiri | Episode 1 | Spandan's First Day At Work | An Arre Original Web Series
